segments.text: I'll tell you, if it ain't Shiny Mark, I'm not accustomed to seeing Pikachu live at these crazy percents, but somehow he just makes every little bit count, but the fair couldn't be enough to slay the star.

full_text: I'll tell you, if it ain't Shiny Mark, I'm not accustomed to seeing Pikachu live at these crazy percents, but somehow he just makes every little bit count, but the fair couldn't be enough to slay the star.
